title: Software Update - Headset and all components have update available - UI
scenario: Software Update UI shows "Update All" button for multi-component headsets and individual update sections per component, with DFU-unsupported components directing to PC app
steps: Tap on a connected device to open Device Settings
Observe the Software Update UI layout
expected: For a single headset: A single update section is shown displaying current firmware version, a link to release notes, and an Update button. For a headset with a charge stand or earbuds with a charge case: An "Update All" button is shown along with individual update sections per component, each displaying current firmware version, release notes link, and Update button. Components that do not support DFU via mobile show a note directing the user to update via the PC app.
